text: My senses are alert with curiosity. The glass enclosure creates a sense of distance, like a threshold between everyday life and the domain of thought and experimentation. Inside, the vivid colors and displays stimulate my mind—the interplay of research and development, of questioning and innovation. I feel a quiet awe, accompanied by a longing to learn and to witness the unfolding dialogue between humans and technology. There is anticipation, an awareness that I am surrounded by the products of human creativity and inquiry.
